from openpyxl import load_workbook

wb = load_workbook('protein_expression.xlsx', data_only=True)
ws_task = wb['Task']
ws_data = wb['Data']

print("=== Checking protein ID matching ===")
for row in range(11, 13):
    task_protein = ws_task.cell(row, 1).value
    print(f"Task row {row}: '{task_protein}'")
    for data_row in range(2, 4):
        data_protein = ws_data.cell(data_row, 1).value
        print(f"  Data row {data_row}: '{data_protein}' {'MATCH' if data_protein == task_protein else 'NO MATCH'}")

print("\n=== Checking sample name matching ===")
for task_col in range(3, 6):
    task_sample = ws_task.cell(10, task_col).value
    print(f"Task col {task_col}: '{task_sample}'")
    for data_col in range(4, 7):
        data_sample = ws_data.cell(1, data_col).value
        print(f"  Data col {data_col}: '{data_sample}' {'MATCH' if data_sample == task_sample else 'NO MATCH'}")

EOF
